series_metadata.series_description: This series includes records and reports pertaining to: Studies - Including Interchange Modification Studies, Interchange Justification Studies, Traffic Impact Studies and Preliminary Engineering Studies. Records may include correspondence, notes, sketches, preliminary plan layouts, etc. Plan Review Records - Including Stage plan submissions, correspondence and review comment details. Design Exceptions - Includes Design Exception reports. Permits - Includes permit applications, plans, notes and correspondence. Access Management Records - Includes submission for access variances, acces appeals and correspondence.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: electronically archived determined be obsolete. ; Paper: paper documents and standard drawings, including transportation studies three (3) construction project has been finalized in Construction Management System(CMS)
